message:
Command `# Check the grt.tcl script to understand what's failing
cat /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/grt.tcl 2>/dev/null | head -80` executed with exit code 0.

function.arguments: {"command": "# Check the grt.tcl script to understand what's failing\ncat /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/grt.tcl 2>/dev/null | head -80"}
function.name: execute_bash

content:

source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/io.tcl
read_current_odb
source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/dpl_cell_pad.tcl

set_propagated_clock [all_clocks]

source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/grt.tcl

# Check Antennas (Pre-Repair)
puts "%OL_CREATE_REPORT antenna.rpt"
check_antennas -verbose
puts "%OL_END_REPORT"

source $::env(SCRIPTS_DIR)/openroad/common/set_rc.tcl
estimate_parasitics -global_routing

write_views

extras.command:
# Check the grt.tcl script to understand what's failing
cat /nix/store/dygnx4pddrv785rmrg7jb5gks9z6hrx7-python3-3.11.9-env/lib/python3.11/site-packages/librelane/scripts/openroad/grt.tcl 2>/dev/null | head -80
